name: Southern Fried Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Shuck the corn, removing any silk.
2. Cut each cob in half lengthwise.
3. Remove the kernels from the cobs (this is known as cream-style cutting).
4. Reserve some of the corn juice for later use.
5. In a large skillet, heat the bacon drippings over medium heat.
6. Add the corn kernels to the hot drippings and toss until coated with fat.
7. Stir in flour, sugar, water, milk, salt, and pepper.
8. Bring the mixture to a boil, stirring constantly.
9. Reduce heat and simmer until the corn is tender, about 20 to 25 minutes. Add a little more hot water if needed for moisture.
